meta.homeTitle: IRS Tax Refund Schedule 2025 — When Will I Get My Refund? | RefundTimeline
meta.homeDesc: Check the 2025 IRS tax refund schedule. Find out when your federal and state refund will arrive. Refund date estimator for e-file, paper return, direct deposit, and check.
meta.statesTitle: State Tax Refund Processing Times 2025 | RefundTimeline
meta.statesDesc: Compare state tax refund processing times for all 50 states. Find your state's average refund timeline, filing deadline, and how to check your refund status.
meta.estimatorTitle: Tax Refund Estimator 2025 — How Much Will I Get? | RefundTimeline
meta.estimatorDesc: Estimate your 2025 federal tax refund amount. Enter your income, withholding, and filing status to calculate your expected refund.
meta.faqTitle: Tax Refund FAQ 2025 — Common Questions Answered | RefundTimeline
meta.faqDesc: Answers to the most common tax refund questions. When will I get my refund? Why is my refund delayed? How do I track my IRS refund?

hero.title: When Will My Tax Refund Arrive?
hero.subtitle: 2025 IRS & State Tax Refund Schedule
hero.filingDatePrompt: Enter your filing date to see your estimated refund date:

schedule.title: IRS Refund Schedule 2025
schedule.subtitle: Based on IRS processing guidelines for 2024 tax year returns

notice.eitc: The IRS cannot issue EITC or ACTC refunds before mid-February by law (PATH Act). If you claimed these credits, your refund will be held until at least February 15, 2025.

estimator.title: Tax Refund Estimator 2025
estimator.subtitle: Estimate your federal tax refund amount
estimator.disclaimer: This is an estimate only. Actual refund may vary based on credits, deductions, and IRS processing.

footer.disclaimer: This site provides estimates based on publicly available IRS data. Actual processing times may vary. RefundTimeline is not affiliated with the IRS or any government agency.

tracking.title: How to Track Your IRS Refund
tracking.step1: File your federal tax return electronically
tracking.step2: Wait 24 hours after e-filing (4 weeks for paper)
tracking.step3: Visit IRS Where's My Refund tool at irs.gov/refunds
tracking.step4: Enter your SSN, filing status, and exact refund amount
tracking.step5: Check your refund status — updated once daily

deadline.title: 2025 Tax Filing Deadline
deadline.passed: The filing deadline has passed. File for an extension or file late.
